job_description:
• Implement 3rd party solutions and partner with the IT Procurement representative to determine contracts, support requirements, training provided, etc.
• Basic experience using Windows and/or Linux environments through coursework, labs, or personal projects Basic familiarity with object‑oriented programming languages (such as Java, C#, or Python) Experience using scripting languages for small projects, automation, or data tasks Ability to write, understand, and troubleshoot SQL queries with minimal guidance Hands‑on experience or coursework using object‑oriented programming languages Introductory experience writing or working with SQL database queries Collecting requirements from customer requests Working closely with Business Operation Teams, Product and Application Development teams, and other internal customers during application development and deployment Principal Software Development EngineerBoise, Idaho, United States of AmericaPosted a month ago.
